2025-03-07T16:56:24.994Z.artist: Nick Cave & The Bad Seeds feat. Kylie Minogue
2025-03-07T16:56:24.994Z.content:
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
They call me 'The Wild Rose'
[ch]A#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But my name was Elisa Day
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Why they call me it, I do not know
[ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]
For my name was Elisa Day

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
From the first day I saw her, I knew she was the one
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
She stared in my eyes and smiled
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
For her lips were the color of the roses
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
That grew down the river, all bloody and wild

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
When he knocked on my door and entered the room
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
My trembling subsided in his sure embrace
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
He would be my first man and with a careful hand
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
He wiped at the tears that ran down my face

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
They call me 'The Wild Rose'
[ch]A#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But my name was Elisa Day
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Why they call me that, I do not know
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
For my name was Elisa Day

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
On the second day, I brought her a flower
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
She was more beautiful than any woman I've seen
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
I said, "Do you know where the wild roses grow
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
So sweet and scarlet and free?"

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
On the second day, he came with a single red rose
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
He said, "Give me your loss and your sorrow"
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
I nodded my head, as I lay on the bed
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
"If I show you the roses, will you follow?"

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
They call me 'The Wild Rose'
[ch]A#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But my name was Elisa Day
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Why they call me that, I do not know
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
For my name was Elisa Day

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
On the third day, he took me to the river
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
He showed me the roses and we kissed
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
And the last thing I heard was a muttered word
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
As he knelt above me with a rock in his fist

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
On the last day, I took her where the wild roses grow
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
She lay on the bank, the wind light as a thief
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
And I kissed her goodbye, said, "All beauty must die"
[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
And I lent down and planted a rose between her teeth

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
They call me 'The Wild Rose'

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]

My name was Elisa Day

[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]

[ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]

[ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]

[ch]Am[/ch]

         [ch]C[/ch]

    [ch]G[/ch]

      [ch]F[/ch]

[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

 [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]

Under a swollen silver moon
    [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
I came walking with the wind
    [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]

[ch]Am[/ch]

       [ch]G[/ch]

    [ch]Dm[/ch]

to drag away your bones
 
[ch]Am[/ch]

   [ch]G[/ch]

         [ch]Dm[/ch]

Intro:
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
As the war machine keeps turning
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]                        
  Death and hatred to mankind, 
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Poisoning their brainwashed minds 
            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Oh lord yeah! 
 
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

Politicians hide themselves away, 
they only started the war 
 
Why should they go out to fight?

[ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
 
[ch]E[/ch]
Time will tell on their power minds, 
making war just for fun 
 
Treating people just like pawns in chess,
                                       [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Wait 'till their judgement day comes, yeah 
 
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] (2x) [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
ashes where the bodies burning

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
hand of God has struck the hour
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
on their knees the war pigs crawling
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Satan, laughing, spreads his wings
